title: jules: record archivist learning on persona duplication 🗃️
summary: Recorded a learning that persona-specific rules must stay in the persona files, even if they appear duplicated, because of how agents consume them.
problem_statement: Persona files contain duplicated boilerplate (e.g., the `## Notes` section), which looks like a prime target for deduplication. However, deduplicating them breaks the agent's context because agents only receive their specific persona file.

proof_summary.claim: Records the intentional duplication of persona notes to prevent future Archivist runs from trying to deduplicate them.

rollback: git reset --hard && git clean -fd (excluding needed run data)
